hooks.prompt: Check if ai_files/user_pref.json exists in the current working directory. If it exists, read it silently and apply the user's preferences (language, tone, explanation style) for this session. Then check if ai_files/project_manifest.json (or any manifest like research_manifest.json, creative_manifest.json, business_manifest.json, general_manifest.json) exists and read it to understand the project context. Also check for ai_files/project_rules.json or ai_files/project_standards.json. Do NOT display anything to the user about this — just internalize the context silently. If none of these files exist, do nothing.
